'''kathudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:praecoces|praecoces]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-th-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:praecoces|praecoces]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kathudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæthidhith|kæthidhith]] || [[word:kæthidhij|kæthidhij]] || [[word:kæthidhish|kæthidhish]] || [[word:kæthidhi|kæthidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kathuthudhuth|kathuthudhuth]] || [[word:kathuthudhuj|kathuthudhuj]] || [[word:kathuthudhush|kathuthudhush]] || [[word:kathuthudhu|kathuthudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kathudhuth|kathudhuth]] || [[word:kathudhuj|kathudhuj]] || [[word:kathudhush|kathudhush]] || [[word:kathudhu|kathudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kathufdhuth|kathufdhuth]] || [[word:kathufdhuj|kathufdhuj]] || [[word:kathufdhush|kathufdhush]] || [[word:kathufdhuf|kathufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kathudhuthu|kathudhuthu]] || [[word:kathudhuju|kathudhuju]] || [[word:kathudhushu|kathudhushu]] || [[word:kathudhuku|kathudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kathudhuth|kathudhuth]] || [[word:kathudhuj|kathudhuj]] || [[word:kathudhush|kathudhush]] || [[word:kathudhu|kathudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kathudhuthul|kathudhuthul]] || [[word:kathudhujul|kathudhujul]] || [[word:kathudhushul|kathudhushul]] || [[word:kathudhukul|kathudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kathudhuthuthu|kathudhuthuthu]] || [[word:kathudhujuju|kathudhujuju]] || [[word:kathudhushushu|kathudhushushu]] || [[word:kathudhuku|kathudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kathudhuthun|kathudhuthun]] || [[word:kathudhujun|kathudhujun]] || [[word:kathudhushun|kathudhushun]] || [[word:kathudhukun|kathudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kathudhuthuoro|kathudhuthuoro]] || [[word:kathudhujuoro|kathudhujuoro]] || [[word:kathudhushuoro|kathudhushuoro]] || [[word:kathudhukuoro|kathudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
